modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty creating a new CSA or NFE job description in YourFuture.

full_description_text: So, I was trying to create a new position description for a CSA or NFE in YourFuture, but I hit a wall. I’m not really sure what steps to follow, and it’s kind of frustrating. I just need some guidance on how to get this job description set up properly.
short_description: Difficulty creating a new CSA or NFE job description in YourFuture.
description: So, I was trying to create a new position description for a CSA or NFE in YourFuture, but I hit a wall. I’m not really sure what steps to follow, and it’s kind of frustrating. I just need some guidance on how to get this job description set up properly.
